title: Automatic Air Freshener Spray Dispenser,Fragrance Sprays Wall Mount/Free Standing Perfume Dispenser for Bathroom Office Hotel White
features: Automatic Air Freshener Dispenser: interval spray time is 7.5, 15.30 minutes and working mode is 24H/DAY/NGT.24H:will work whatever have light or not all whole day;DAY:the light sensing mode works regardless of the light on or the normal light during the day;NGT:no light,at night or when the light is dark, if the room is dark during the day,adjust this mode to start working.
Glade Automatic Spray Dispenser: glad automatic spray machine matches international standard size air freshener refill can(10fl.oz/300ml),5.51"(H) x 2.56"(D),Not included).

Commercial Air Freshener Dispenser:wall mounted automatic air freshener dispenser operated by 2 pcs AA batteries (NOT INCLUDED).Support long-lasting fragrance into your bedroom, guestroom, beauty center, gym and so on.
Wall Mounted/Free Standing:automatic air fresheners can be mounted to wall, 7-9 feet above the floor;or you can just put it standing on your bedroom desk, office table.
Automatic Air Freshener Dispenser placed high, better effect,when first time test machine working don't toward your face,prohibit spraying machine near the fire.
